title: Archived Execplan Retention Pressure
goal: Implement #439 so archived execplans expose an explicit retention/shrink policy and selector-only review signal.
non_goals: Do not delete or rewrite historical archives in this slice.
Do not make archived execplans part of ordinary startup.
Do not add a new command surface.

intent.outcome: Operational compression should identify archive-retention pressure and name safe outcomes before any archive shrink/delete decision.
intent.constraints: Archive retention remains advisory and selector-driven; durable learning must be promoted before archive evidence shrinks.
intent.latitude: Add compact fields to existing report output and focused tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if implementation requires a separate archive-management workflow or automatic deletion.

execution.next_step: Archive, commit, push, close #439, refresh evidence, and continue the next footprint slice.
execution.proof: workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surfaces, summary/reconcile/proof dogfooding, planning doctor, root CLI authority audit

invariants: Archive retention output is advisory and does not delete artifacts.
Durable learning routes to Memory, docs, contracts, checks, or issues before shrink/delete.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #436 adds operational footprint pressure; #449 makes package use cheaper than bypassing it.

required_continuation.activation trigger: after #439, continue #440/#441 footprint slices or the next higher-priority roadmap lane

active_milestone.scope: Add selector-only archive retention policy/review signal.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Define retention pressure for archived execplans.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No automatic deletion and no startup expansion.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact report field names and candidate action shape.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The fix would require changing archive semantics or migrating historical archives.

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, close #439, refresh evidence, and continue the next footprint slice.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/archived-execplan-retention-pressure.plan.json src/agentic_workspace/cli.py tests/test_workspace_cli.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section operational_compression --format json
completion_criteria: Archived execplans expose retain/shrink/stub/delete/promote-summary-elsewhere policy in selector output.
Operational compression identifies archive footprint pressure without broad manual archive reading.
Policy requires durable learning promotion before shrink/delete.
Default startup and active planning remain compact.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: operational_compression now exposes archive_retention_policy with retain/shrink/stub/delete/promote-summary-elsewhere outcomes, selector-only candidates, and before_shrink_or_delete promotion requirements.
execution_summary.validation confirmed: focused operational compression tests, full workspace CLI tests, ruff, planning surface check, summary, reconcile, proof selection, planning doctor, root CLI authority audit, and live operational_compression report passed.
execution_summary.resume from: next footprint or command-generation roadmap slice after evidence refresh
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Keep report tests and archive_retention_policy output as durable evidence; do not preserve live command transcripts.

discard.summary: Validation transcripts and intermediate report payloads.

continuation.summary: Continue #440/#441 footprint-control child slices and keep #436/#449 open until their remaining acceptance signals land.

config_check.summary: tests/test_workspace_cli.py guards archive retention policy outcomes, advisory-only behavior, promotion-before-shrink/delete, and candidate signals.

issue_follow_up.summary: Close #439 with proof; keep #436 and #449 open.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Add retention pressure for archived execplans.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: Operational compression now defines archive retention outcomes, identifies candidate signals without broad manual archive reading, and requires durable-learning promotion before shrink/delete.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice is complete and remaining intent is routed to a checked-in continuation owner.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen when .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml roadmap lane operational-footprint-pressure activates a fresh bounded slice.

cost_assessment.reason: Agents can inspect archive retention pressure through one compact selector instead of manually reading the archive or inventing deletion policy.

improvement_signal_review.finding: Archive footprint pressure existed, but retention outcomes and pre-shrink guardrails were implicit.
improvement_signal_review.resolution: archive_retention_policy now names outcomes, candidates, and before_shrink_or_delete requirements.
